name: pop-anthem
title: Pop Anthem
description: Euphoric festival-pop lift — soaring synths, a huge stadium chorus, and the sound of ten thousand hands in the air.
style: festival stadium pop, soaring layered synths, four-on-the-floor kick, big gang-vocal chorus, euphoric and uplifting, ~124 BPM, bright confident female or male vocal, light autotune polish

production.drums: four-on-the-floor kick, clap-heavy snare, rising snare-roll builds
production.bass: punchy synth bass, sidechained to the kick

hookGuidance: big, singable, built for a crowd to shout back word for word
